description: Generated lifecycle policy for ops/scripts surfaces. Module entries are derived from the live ops/scripts tree, pyproject.toml console scripts, Make recipe module references, and direct fallback inventory; human-owned lifecycle guidance lives in ops/script-lifecycle-overrides.json.
